name: New Hua Du Supercenter Co.,Ltd.
summary: New Hua Du Supercenter Co.,Ltd. operates a chain of hypermarkets, supermarkets, and department stores. The company has a network of stores in Fuzhou, Xiamen, Zhangzhou, Quanzhou, Sanming, Longyan, Putian, Nanping, Ningde, Shantou, Nanchang, Zhangzhou, and Hangzhou cities. New Hua Du Supercenter Co.,Ltd. is based in Fuzhou, China.
